IndexPage.title: Text Format Cleaner Online | Clean and Format Text
IndexPage.description: Text Format is a free online text format cleaner for cleaning text, formatting text online, removing formatting, stripping HTML, removing characters, and replacing text.
textClean.h1: Text Format Cleaner and Text Cleaning Tool
textClean.h1_desc: Text Format is an all-in-one text cleaning and text formatting online tool for simple and advanced text operations, including format text, clean text, remove line breaks, strip HTML, convert case, and find and replace text. Using this tool helps you quickly turn messy content into clean, tidy text without tedious manual work.
textClean.default_text: Welcome to Text Format. Paste your text here
textClean.line_to_left: to the start of every line.
textClean.line_to_right: to the end of every line.
textClean.h2_1_p: Text Format is a powerful web-based format cleaner designed to manipulate and format text according to user preferences. This tool offers a range of functionality, including the removal of punctuation, emojis, non-ASCII characters, and emails, as well as HTML tag manipulation and line-based operations. Whether you need to clean up text for analysis, prepare content for publication, or improve readability, the interface provides a comprehensive set of features for everyday text processing.
textClean.h2_2_p: The workflow is straightforward and user-friendly. Here's a step-by-step guide to help you get started:
textClean.h2_2_h3_1_p: Begin by pasting or typing your content into the Text Format editor on the webpage.
textClean.h2_2_h3_2_p: Check the boxes for the operations you want to apply to your text. The available operations include:
textClean.h2_2_h3_2_h4_1_p: Remove punctuation, strip emojis, remove non-ASCII characters, remove non-alphanumeric characters, and remove emails.
textClean.h2_2_h3_2_h4_2_p: Unescape HTML tags, remove all HTML tags, remove HTML IDs and classes, decode HTML character entities, and decode URL-encoded characters.
textClean.h2_2_h3_2_h4_3_p: Add specific content before or after every line, or remove characters from the line start or line end.
textClean.h2_2_h3_2_h4_4_p: Find specific content and replace it with another, replace spaces with tabs or vice versa.
textClean.h2_2_h3_3_p: Once you've selected the desired operations, click the 'Clean Text' button to let Text Format process the content according to your selections.
textClean.h2_2_h3_4_p: Use the buttons provided to perform additional actions like removing extra spaces, empty lines, or line breaks, changing case (uppercase, lowercase, capitalize sentences or words), removing duplicate lines, copying text to the clipboard, or clearing the textarea.
textClean.h2_3_p_1: Text Format offers a comprehensive suite of features designed for common text manipulation needs. Below is a detailed overview of the functionality provided by this online format cleaner:
textClean.h2_3_h3_1_h4_1_p: Automatically strip all punctuation marks from your text to create a clean, streamlined document.
textClean.h2_3_h3_1_h4_2_p: emove all emojis from your content, ensuring that only alphanumeric characters and standard symbols remain.
textClean.h2_3_h3_1_h4_3_p: Eliminate all non-ASCII characters, which is especially useful for preparing text for systems that only support ASCII encoding.
textClean.h2_3_h3_1_h4_4_p: Strip out any characters that are not letters or numbers, resulting in purely alphanumeric text.
textClean.h2_3_h3_1_h4_5_p: Detect and remove email addresses from the content, useful for privacy concerns or data anonymization.
textClean.h2_3_h3_2_h4_1_p: Convert HTML entities back to their corresponding characters, making the text more readable.
textClean.h2_3_h3_2_h4_2_p: Strip all HTML tags from your content, leaving only the raw content.
textClean.h2_3_h3_2_h4_3_p: Remove ID attributes from HTML elements in the content, useful for cleaning up copied HTML code.
textClean.h2_3_h3_2_h4_4_p: Strip class attributes from HTML elements, simplifying the HTML structure.
textClean.h2_3_h3_2_h4_5_p: Replace HTML character entities with their actual characters, enhancing text readability.
textClean.h2_3_h3_2_h4_6_p: Convert URL-encoded characters back to their original form, making URLs and other encoded content easier to read.
textClean.h2_3_h3_3_h4_1_p: Add specific content to line starts, useful for formatting lists or code.
textClean.h2_3_h3_3_h4_2_p: Append content to line endings, useful for annotations or comments.
textClean.h2_3_h3_3_h4_3_p: Remove a specified number of characters from the start of every line.
textClean.h2_3_h3_3_h4_4_p: Remove a specified number of characters from the end of every line.
textClean.h2_3_h3_4_h4_1_p: Search for specific content and replace it with another, useful for quick edits and corrections.
textClean.h2_3_h3_4_h4_2_p: Convert a specified number of consecutive spaces into a single tab character, useful for code formatting.
textClean.h2_3_h3_4_h4_3_p: Convert tabs into spaces, useful for adjusting indentation and spacing in text.
textClean.h2_3_h3_5_h4_1_p: Remove all extra spaces from the content, leaving only single spaces between words.
textClean.h2_3_h3_5_h4_2_p: Delete all empty lines from the content, useful for consolidating content.
textClean.h2_3_h3_5_h4_3_p: Convert line breaks into spaces, transforming multiline content into a single continuous line.
textClean.h2_3_h3_5_h4_4_p: Convert all characters in the text to uppercase.
textClean.h2_3_h3_5_h4_5_p: Convert all characters in the text to lowercase.
textClean.h2_3_h3_5_h4_6_p: Capitalize the first letter in every sentence, useful for proper formatting.
textClean.h2_3_h3_5_h4_7_p: Capitalize the first letter in every word.
textClean.h2_3_h3_5_h4_8_p: Eliminate duplicate lines from the text, leaving only unique lines.
textClean.h2_3_h3_5_h4_9_p: Easily copy the formatted text to the clipboard for use in other applications.
textClean.h2_3_h3_5_h4_10_p: Quickly clear all text from the input area, readying it for new content.
textClean.h2_3_p_2: By combining these powerful features, Text Format allows users to effortlessly clean, format, and manipulate text, making it a practical tool for writers, editors, developers, data analysts, and more. Whether you need to prepare text for publication, coding, data analysis, or any other application, this cleaner provides the controls you need to get the job done efficiently.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy ｜ Text-Format
privacyPolicy.description: This Privacy Policy outlines how Text-Format collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our website.
privacyPolicy.desc: Thank you for choosing Text-Format! This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our website located at text-format.com.
privacyPolicy.h4_1_pa: a. Personal Data: Text-Format operates entirely on the client-side and does not collect or store any personal data.
privacyPolicy.h4_1_pb: b. Non-Personal Data: We may use web cookies to enhance your browsing experience, but no personal data is collected or stored.
privacyPolicy.h4_2_p: Since Text-Format operates on the client-side, no data collection occurs, and all processing is done locally on your device.
privacyPolicy.h4_3_p: We do not share any data with third parties as no data is collected or stored by Text-Format.
privacyPolicy.h4_4_p: Text-Format does not collect any personal data from users, including children. All operations are conducted locally on the user's device.
privacyPolicy.h4_5_p: We will notify users of any updates to this Privacy Policy by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.
privacyPolicy.h4_6_p: If you have any questions or concerns regarding our Privacy Policy, please contact us at
deleteFormat.title: Delete Format - Remove Text Formatting Online,remove format
deleteFormat.description: Delete Format - Free online tool to remove text formatting, spaces, newlines and other formatting characters
deleteFormat.h1_desc: Free online tool to remove text formatting, spaces, newlines and other formatting characters
deleteFormat.about_desc: Delete Format is a free online tool that helps you remove unwanted formatting from your text.
deleteFormat.feature_1_desc: Our text formatting remover offers a clean and intuitive interface, making it easy for users of all skill levels to navigate. Simply paste your text into the tool, and with one click, you can strip away unwanted formatting, ensuring a hassle-free experience.
deleteFormat.feature_2_desc: Experience immediate results with our formatting removal tool. As soon as you input your text, the automatic processing occurs in real-time, allowing you to see and copy the cleaned text without waiting for long processing times.
deleteFormat.feature_3_desc: This tool effectively removes various text formatting issues, including spaces, newlines, tabs, and special characters. Whether you're working with plain text, HTML, or other formats, our tool will seamlessly clean your content for better usability.
deleteFormat.feature_4_desc: Enjoy the convenience of a free online tool designed to simplify your text editing tasks. No subscriptions or hidden fees—just quick and easy formatting removal whenever you need it.
deleteFormat.feature_5_desc: We value your privacy, which is why our tool does not store any data or text you input. Once you clean your text, all information is deleted, ensuring your content remains secure and private.
deleteFormat.feature_6_desc: Access our text formatting removal tool from any device with an internet connection. Compatible with all browsers and operating systems, it allows you to clean your text efficiently whether you're on a desktop, tablet, or smartphone.
deleteFormat.faq_1_title: What is the purpose of a text formatting remover?
deleteFormat.faq_1_desc: A text formatting remover is an online tool designed to strip away all types of text formatting from your content. This includes removing spaces, newlines, tabs, and special characters. By using this tool, you can easily clean up your text for a more uniform appearance or to prepare it for further processing.
deleteFormat.faq_2_title: How does the online tool work?
deleteFormat.faq_2_desc: The online tool to remove text formatting works by analyzing the input text and identifying elements such as extra spaces, line breaks, and other formatting features. Once detected, it eliminates these unwanted characters to provide you with clean, formatted text. Simply paste your text into the tool, and it will process the content instantly.
deleteFormat.faq_3_title: Is there a cost associated with using this tool?
deleteFormat.faq_3_desc: No, our online text formatting remover is completely free to use! You can access it anytime without any signup or hidden fees. Just visit the website, paste your text, and click the 'Remove Formatting' button to get started.
deleteFormat.faq_4_title: Can this tool handle large volumes of text?
deleteFormat.faq_4_desc: Yes, our text formatting remover can handle large volumes of text efficiently. However, for extremely large texts, it is advised to break them into smaller sections to ensure smooth processing. Regardless of the size, the tool is designed to quickly deliver clean text without extensive waiting times.
deleteFormat.faq_5_title: What formats can I remove with this tool?
deleteFormat.faq_5_desc: Our online text formatting remover can handle various types of content, including plain text, HTML markup, and text from word processors. It effectively strips out formatting characters like font size, style, hyperlinks, and paragraph breaks, providing you with a clean text output suitable for multiple applications.
deleteFormat.faq_6_title: Is my data secure when using this online tool?
deleteFormat.faq_6_desc: Absolutely! We prioritize your privacy and data security. The tool operates on a secure server, and no text you input is stored or recorded. Once you remove the formatting and receive your clean text, all data is promptly deleted from our systems.
formatHtml.title: Format HTML Online - HTML Formatter, HTML Beautifier
formatHtml.description: Format HTML Online - Free online HTML formatter and beautifier to format and beautify your HTML code with proper indentation
formatHtml.h1_desc: Free online HTML formatter and beautifier to format and beautify your HTML code with proper indentation
formatHtml.about_desc: Our HTML Formatter is a free online tool that helps you format and beautify your HTML code. It adds proper indentation and spacing to make your code more readable and maintainable.
formatHtml.feature_1_desc: Our HTML formatter offers a clean and intuitive interface, making it easy for anyone to input and format their code. Whether you're a seasoned developer or a beginner, you'll find it simple to paste your HTML and get instant results.
formatHtml.feature_2_desc: Enjoy the benefits of our online HTML beautifier completely free of charge. There are no downloads or installations required, and you can access our service from any device with internet connectivity.
formatHtml.feature_3_desc: The HTML formatter ensures your code is properly indented and organized. This makes it easier to read and maintain your code, which is essential for developers who want to ensure high coding standards.
formatHtml.feature_4_desc: See your formatted HTML in real-time. As you input your code, our tool instantly displays the beautified version, allowing you to make adjustments on-the-fly and ensuring your final output is just right.
formatHtml.feature_5_desc: Our online HTML formatter is designed to work seamlessly across all major web browsers. Whether you're using Chrome, Firefox, or Safari, you'll experience consistent performance and formatting results.
formatHtml.faq_1_desc: An HTML formatter is a tool or software that takes unformatted or poorly formatted HTML code and organizes it into a more readable and structured format. It adds proper indentation and spacing to the code, which improves its readability and makes it easier for developers to work with.
formatHtml.faq_2_title: Why should I use an online HTML beautifier?
formatHtml.faq_2_desc: Using an online HTML beautifier provides a quick and convenient way to clean up your HTML code without the need for installing software. It can save you time by automatically applying consistent formatting and making your code look professional and easy to understand.
formatHtml.faq_3_title: Is the online HTML formatter free to use?
formatHtml.faq_3_desc: Yes, our online HTML formatter is completely free to use. You can format and beautify your HTML code without any cost, making it accessible for everyone, from beginners to experienced developers.
formatHtml.faq_4_title: How do I use the HTML beautifier?
formatHtml.faq_4_desc: To use the HTML beautifier, simply paste your unformatted HTML code into the provided text area and click the 'Format' button. The tool will process your code and display the beautified version, which you can then copy and use in your projects.
formatHtml.faq_5_title: Can I format large HTML files with the tool?
formatHtml.faq_5_desc: Yes, our online HTML formatter can handle large HTML files; however, performance may vary depending on file size and complexity. For optimal results, it's recommended to break down extremely large files or use the tool for parts of your code.
formatHtml.faq_6_title: Is my code safe when using the online formatter?
formatHtml.faq_6_desc: Yes, your code is safe when using our online HTML formatter. We do not store or share your code after formatting. Your privacy is important to us, and we ensure a secure and private experience while using our tool.

removeDuplicates.title: Remove Duplicates Lines Online, Duplicate Remover Tool
removeDuplicates.description: Free online tool to remove duplicate lines with case-insensitive and sorting options. Quickly eliminate duplicate text lines for better efficiency.
removeDuplicates.keywords: remove duplicates, duplicate lines, remove duplicate lines, deduplication tool, online duplicate remover, text deduplication
removeDuplicates.h1_desc: Powerful online tool to quickly remove duplicate lines from text. Support case-insensitive matching and sorting options to help you clean your text data effortlessly.
removeDuplicates.default_text: Paste your text here, one item per line...
removeDuplicates.about_desc: Remove Duplicates is a free online tool specifically designed to eliminate duplicate lines from text. This tool supports various configuration options, including case-insensitive comparison and result sorting, making it an ideal choice for list processing, data cleaning, and text organization.
removeDuplicates.feature_1_desc: Our remove duplicates tool employs advanced algorithms to identify and eliminate duplicate lines. Whether they are completely identical lines or lines that differ only in case, it can accurately identify and process them, ensuring the accuracy of the final result.
removeDuplicates.feature_2_desc: Provides ignore case option, allowing you to decide whether to treat 'Apple' and 'apple' as duplicates based on your needs. This remove duplicates feature is particularly suitable for processing user input data and mixed-format text lists.
removeDuplicates.feature_3_desc: After removing duplicate lines, you can choose to sort the results in ascending or descending order. This remove duplicates tool makes your data more organized and convenient for subsequent viewing and use.
removeDuplicates.feature_4_desc: See the remove duplicates results immediately after clicking apply. No waiting required, real-time display of processed text allows you to quickly verify whether the results meet expectations.
removeDuplicates.feature_5_desc: Enjoy completely free remove duplicates service without requiring account registration or paid subscription. Use our tool anytime, anywhere to clean your text data and improve work efficiency.
removeDuplicates.feature_6_desc: Your text data is processed entirely locally in the browser and never uploaded to servers. This remove duplicates tool ensures your sensitive information remains completely confidential, providing you with the most secure user experience.
removeDuplicates.faq_1_title: What is a remove duplicates tool?
removeDuplicates.faq_1_desc: A remove duplicates tool is a professional online remove duplicates utility for eliminating duplicate lines from text. It can identify completely identical lines and handle case differences according to your settings, ultimately outputting clean text without duplicate content.
removeDuplicates.faq_2_title: How to use the remove duplicates feature?
removeDuplicates.faq_2_desc: It's very simple: 1) Paste the text you want to process into the input box, one item per line; 2) Select options like ignore case, sorting, etc. according to your needs; 3) Click the 'Apply Changes' button; 4) View and copy the processed results.
removeDuplicates.faq_3_title: What does the ignore case option do?
removeDuplicates.faq_3_desc: When the ignore case option is enabled, the remove duplicates tool treats 'Apple', 'APPLE', and 'apple' as the same item, keeping only one of them. If this option is not enabled, these would be treated as different items.
removeDuplicates.faq_4_title: How does the sorting feature work?
removeDuplicates.faq_4_desc: After remove duplicates processing is complete, you can choose to sort the results. Ascending sort arranges items alphabetically from A to Z, while descending sort arranges from Z to A. The sorting also considers the ignore case setting.
removeDuplicates.faq_5_title: How much text can this tool handle?
removeDuplicates.faq_5_desc: Our remove duplicates tool can handle large amounts of text data. Since processing is done entirely in your browser, processing speed mainly depends on your device performance. Generally, thousands or even tens of thousands of lines of data can be processed quickly.
removeDuplicates.faq_6_desc: Absolutely safe! This remove duplicates tool runs entirely locally in your browser, and no text you input is sent to our servers. After processing is complete, data is not saved either, ensuring your privacy is completely protected.
removeDuplicates.how_to_use_title: How to Use Remove Duplicates Tool
removeDuplicates.step_1_desc: Paste the text you want to deduplicate into the text box. Make sure each line contains one item so the remove duplicates tool can correctly identify and process each line.
removeDuplicates.step_2_desc: Choose the appropriate options according to your needs: ignore case allows the tool to treat same content with different cases as duplicates; sorting options make results more organized.
removeDuplicates.step_3_desc: Click the 'Apply Changes' button, and the remove duplicates tool will immediately process your text, removing all duplicate lines and sorting according to your settings.
removeDuplicates.step_4_desc: Review the processed results, and after confirming they meet expectations, click the 'Copy' button to copy the cleaned text to the clipboard for use elsewhere.
removeDuplicates.use_case_1_desc: When processing customer email lists, duplicate email addresses are often encountered. Using the remove duplicates tool can quickly clean the list, avoiding sending duplicate emails to the same user and improving marketing effectiveness.
removeDuplicates.use_case_2_desc: Pre-cleaning data with the remove duplicates function before importing into a database can avoid duplicate records in the database, improve data quality, and reduce subsequent data maintenance work.
removeDuplicates.use_case_3_desc: SEO experts and content creators can use the remove duplicates tool to organize keyword lists, remove duplicate keywords, and make lists more organized and manageable through the sorting function.
removeDuplicates.use_case_4_desc: Students and researchers can use the remove duplicates tool to remove duplicate entries when organizing reference materials, literature lists, or study notes, making materials more concise and easier to review.
fontRemover.title: Font Remover - Remove Text Font Styles Online, Text Font Cleaner
fontRemover.description: Font Remover - Free online tool to remove fancy fonts and text styles, converting styled text to regular Latin letters, numbers, and punctuation marks.
fontRemover.keywords: font remover, text font cleaner, remove font styles, styled text converter, fancy font remover, text style remover
fontRemover.h1_desc: Free online font remover tool to strip fancy fonts and decorative styles from text, converting them to regular Latin letters, numbers, and punctuation marks for better readability.
fontRemover.preserve_symbols_desc: Enter characters or symbols you want to keep from the original font style (optional).
fontRemover.about_desc: Font Remover is a specialized online tool designed to remove decorative fonts and styling from text. It effectively converts fancy Unicode fonts, mathematical symbols, and styled characters back to standard Latin letters, numbers, and punctuation marks, making text more accessible and readable across different platforms and applications.
fontRemover.feature_1_desc: Our font remover tool recognizes and converts a wide range of Unicode font styles including bold, italic, script, fraktur, double-struck, sans-serif, monospace, and many other decorative fonts. It ensures that all fancy styling is properly converted to standard characters.
fontRemover.feature_2_desc: The font remover allows you to specify which characters or symbols you want to preserve from the original styling. This feature gives you control over the conversion process and lets you maintain certain decorative elements if needed.
fontRemover.feature_3_desc: Experience immediate font removal results with our tool. Simply paste your styled text, configure your preferences, and click the convert button to instantly see your text transformed into clean, standard characters.
fontRemover.feature_4_desc: Our font remover supports various font styles including mathematical alphanumeric symbols, circled letters, Roman numerals, fullwidth characters, and other Unicode decorative fonts commonly used in social media and messaging platforms.
fontRemover.feature_5_desc: Enjoy our font remover tool completely free of charge. The intuitive interface makes it easy for anyone to clean their text, whether you're a student, professional, or casual user dealing with styled text from various sources.
fontRemover.feature_6_desc: Your text is processed entirely in your browser with our font remover. No data is sent to servers or stored anywhere, ensuring complete privacy and security of your content throughout the font removal process.
fontRemover.faq_1_title: What is a font remover tool?
fontRemover.faq_1_desc: A font remover tool is an online utility that converts fancy or styled text back to standard characters. It removes decorative Unicode fonts, mathematical symbols, and other styled characters, replacing them with regular Latin letters, numbers, and punctuation marks.
fontRemover.faq_2_title: What types of fonts can this tool remove?
fontRemover.faq_2_desc: Our font remover can handle various Unicode font styles including bold, italic, script, fraktur, double-struck, sans-serif, monospace, circled letters, Roman numerals, fullwidth characters, and many other decorative fonts commonly found in social media posts and styled text.
fontRemover.faq_3_title: How does the preserve symbols feature work?
fontRemover.faq_3_desc: The preserve symbols feature allows you to specify which characters should remain unchanged during the font removal process. Simply enter the characters you want to keep in their original form, and the tool will convert everything else to standard characters.
fontRemover.faq_4_title: Can I use this tool for large amounts of text?
fontRemover.faq_4_desc: Yes, our font remover can handle large volumes of text efficiently. Since the processing is done in your browser, performance depends on your device capabilities, but the tool is optimized to handle substantial amounts of text quickly.
fontRemover.faq_5_title: Is the font remover tool free to use?
fontRemover.faq_5_desc: Absolutely! Our font remover tool is completely free to use with no restrictions. You can convert as much styled text as you need without any charges, subscriptions, or hidden fees.
fontRemover.faq_6_title: Why would I need to remove font styles from text?
fontRemover.faq_6_desc: Font removal is useful for improving text accessibility, ensuring compatibility across different platforms, preparing text for databases or systems that don't support Unicode fonts, and creating clean, readable content for professional or academic purposes.
fontRemover.how_to_use_title: How to Use Font Remover Tool
fontRemover.step_1_desc: Paste or type the text with fancy fonts or decorative styles into the input text area. The font remover tool will analyze all characters and identify which ones need to be converted to standard characters.
fontRemover.step_2_desc: If you want to keep certain symbols or characters in their original styled form, enter them in the 'Preserve Symbols' field. This is optional - leave it blank if you want to convert all styled characters.
fontRemover.step_3_desc: Click the 'Remove Font Styles' button to process your text. The font remover will instantly convert all fancy fonts and decorative characters to their standard equivalents while preserving any symbols you specified.
fontRemover.step_4_desc: Review the converted text to ensure it meets your needs, then click the 'Copy' button to copy the clean, standard text to your clipboard for use in other applications or documents.
fontRemover.use_case_1_desc: Convert fancy Unicode fonts from social media posts into readable standard text. This font remover helps content creators and marketers clean up styled text for better accessibility and platform compatibility.
fontRemover.use_case_2_desc: Ensure text consistency in academic papers, reports, and professional documents by removing decorative fonts that may not display properly across different systems or when printed.
fontRemover.use_case_3_desc: Prepare text for database entry or system integration by converting Unicode fonts to standard characters. This font remover prevents encoding issues and ensures data compatibility across different platforms.
fontRemover.use_case_4_desc: Make text more accessible for screen readers and assistive technologies by converting styled fonts to standard characters. This font remover helps create inclusive content that can be properly interpreted by accessibility tools.
